zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Harrington於1450年出生在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素時，她的父親Sir William Harrington29歲，母親Elizabeth Pilkington28歲。她於1467年與Richard Holland of Denton IV在英國藍卡爾普雷斯可特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年11月19日在英國藍卡爾丹頓享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Harrington于1450年出生在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素时，她的父亲Sir William Harrington29岁，母亲Elizabeth Pilkington28岁。她于1467年与Richard Holland of Denton IV在英国藍卡爾普雷斯可特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年11月19日在英国藍卡爾丹頓享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Herington
meanings: English: variant of   Harrington   or   Herrington  .

variants.name: Herrington
meanings: habitational name from Heronden in Tenterden (Kent) or Herrington in Houghton (Durham). The Kent placename may derive from an Old English personal name Hȳra + Old English connective -ing- + denn ‘pasture’, while the Durham placename may come from Old English hæring ‘rocky place’ (from hær ‘rock, heap of stones’ + the placename forming suffix -ing) or hæren ‘rocky’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Arrington
meanings: variant of Harrington with loss of initial H-.
possibly a habitational name from Arrington, a place in Cambridgeshire, named from an Old English byname, Earn(a), meaning ‘eagle’ + -inga- ‘people or followers of’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Harrington was born in 1450, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir William Harrington, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth Pilkington, was 28. She married Richard Holland of Denton IV in 1467, in Prescot, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 19 November 1498, in Denton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Harrington est née en 1450, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Harrington, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Pilkington, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Holland of Denton IV en 1467, à Prescot, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 novembre 1498, à Denton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Harrington 1450 in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Harrington 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Pilkington 28. Sie hat 1467 in Prescot, Lancashire, England Richard Holland of Denton IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. November 1498 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Denton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Harrington è nata il nel 1450 nel Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir William Harrington, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Pilkington, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Richard Holland of Denton IV nel 1467, nel Prescot, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 novembre 1498, nel Denton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Harringtonが1450年にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルで生まれた時，父Sir William Harringtonは29歳，母Elizabeth Pilkingtonは28歳であった。1467年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレスコトでRichard Holland of Denton IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年11月19日にイギリスランカシュアイアデントンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Harrington(이)가 1450년 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Harrington(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Pilkington(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1467년 영국 랭카실르 프레스컷에서 Richard Holland of Denton IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 11월 19일 영국 랭카실르 덴턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Harrington nasceu em 1450, em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Harrington, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Pilkington, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Holland of Denton IV em 1467, em Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1498, em Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Harrington родилась в 1450 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Harrington было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Pilkington, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Holland of Denton IV в 1467 г. в местности прескот, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 19 ноября 1498 г. в местности дентон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Harrington nació en 1450, en Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Harrington, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Pilkington, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Richard Holland of Denton IV en 1467, en Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1498, en Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
